source: 25 kV AC Overhead/MTU 12V 1600 R80L Diesel Engine
target: 25千伏交流架空线路/MTU 12V 1600 R80L柴油发动机

source: 25 kV AC Overhead/MTU 12V 1600 R80L Diesel Engine
target: 25千伏交流架空线路/MTU 12V 1600 R80L柴油发动机

source: A TPWS Overspeed has caused a penalty brake application. Acknowledge the alarm by pressing the Overspeed button on the TPWS control panel.
target: TPWS 超速警报已触发惩罚性制动。请按下TPWS控制面板上的超速按钮确认警报。

source: A TPWS SPAD has caused a penalty brake application. Acknowledge the alarm by pressing the SPAD button on the TPWS control panel.
target: TPWS SPAD 系统触发了罚刹。请按下 TPWS 控制面板上的 SPAD 按钮确认警报。

source: A Vigilance warning was not acknowledged in time and has caused a penalty brake application. Wait for the train to come to a stop and the 60 second timer to elapse, the brakes will then release allowing you to continue.
target: 由于未及时响应警示，列车已启动惩罚性制动。请等待列车完全停稳且60秒倒计时结束后，制动系统将自动解除，您即可继续行驶。

source: A passenger door has become stuck. Indentify and manually operate the door to unstick it.
target: 乘客车门卡住了。请找到该车门并手动操作，使其脱离卡住状态。

source: An AWS warning was not acknowledged in time causing a penalty brake application.
target: AWS 警告未及时得到确认，导致实施了惩罚性制动。

source: Automatic Warning System/Train Protection and Warning System
target: 自动报警系统/列车保护和报警系统

source: Auxiliary Power must be turned on before attempting to drive this train.
target: 驾驶这列火车之前，必须先打开辅助电源。

source: Auxillary Power has tripped. Bring the train to a stop. Once stopped, press and hold the Aux On button for 10 seconds.
target: 辅助电源跳闸。请将列车停下。停车后，按住辅助电源开启按钮 10 秒钟。

source: Close the passenger doors before applying power.
target: 施加动力前请先关闭乘客侧车门。
尤斯顿 - 米尔顿凯恩斯
尤斯顿 - 米尔顿凯恩斯
全球移动系统 - 铁路

source: Insert and set the Master Key to ON to activate this cab.
target: 插入主钥匙并将其设置为“打开”以激活此驾驶室。
左侧外部照明灯保险丝

source: One of the Diesel Engines has stalled. It will need restarting.
target: 其中一台柴油发动机熄火了，需要重新启动。

source: Press the Diesel push button to allow the system to configure for engine operation.
target: 按下柴油按钮，使系统能够配置发动机运行。

source: Press the Electric push button to allow the system to configure for Pantograph mode.
target: 按下电动按钮，使系统配置为受电弓模式。

source: Press the Engine Start push button to start the diesel engines to take power.
target: 按下发动机启动按钮，启动柴油发动机以获取动力。

source: Press the Pantograph Up push button to raise the pantograph and allow the system to take overhead power.
target: 按下受电弓升起按钮，升起受电弓，使系统能够接收架空电力。

source: Release the AWS penalty brake by pressing the AWS button on the TPWS control panel.
target: 按下 TPWS 控制面板上的 AWS 按钮，释放 AWS 惩罚制动。

source: Release the TPWS Overspeed penalty brake by pressing the Overspeed button on the TPWS control panel.
target: 按下 TPWS 控制面板上的超速按钮，释放 TPWS 超速惩罚制动器。

source: Release the TPWS SPAD penalty brake by pressing the SPAD button on the TPWS control panel.
target: 按下 TPWS 控制面板上的 SPAD 按钮，释放 TPWS SPAD 罚刹。

source: Remote tail light set to {in} on {id}
target: 远程尾灯设置为 {id} 上的 {in}

source: Reset the DRA before applying power.

target: 右侧外部照明灯保险丝

source: Set the Power Handle to OFF to release the traction lock.
target: 将动力手柄设置为“关闭”以解除牵引锁定。

source: Set the direction of travel to FORWARD or REVERSE before applying power.
target: 施加动力前，请将行驶方向设置为前进或后退。

source: The GSM-R has turned off. Bring the train to a stop. Once stopped, switch the GSM-R back on.
target: GSM-R 已关闭。请将列车停稳。停车后，重新打开 GSM-R。

source: The Pantograph has dropped. Bring the train to a stop. Once stopped, set reverser to neutral and then try raising the pantograph.
target: 受电弓已落下。请将列车停稳。停车后，将换向器置于空挡，然后尝试升起受电弓。

source: The Windshield Wiper appears to have become stuck.
This passenger door has been unstuck.
target: 这扇乘客车门已经修好了。

source: Train Protection and Warning System/Automatic Warning System
target: 列车保护和预警系统/自动预警系统

source: Wait for the train to come to a stop and the 60 second timer to elapse, then release the brakes by pressing the AWS button on the TPWS control panel.
target: 等待列车停稳且 60 秒计时器结束，然后按下 TPWS 控制面板上的 AWS 按钮释放制动。

source: Wait for the train to come to a stop and the 60 second timer to elapse, then release the brakes by pressing the Overspeed button on the TPWS control panel.
target: 等待列车停稳且 60 秒计时器结束，然后按下 TPWS 控制面板上的超速按钮释放制动。

source: Wait for the train to come to a stop and the 60 second timer to elapse, then release the brakes by pressing the SPAD button on the TPWS control panel.
target: 等待列车停稳且 60 秒计时器结束，然后按下 TPWS 控制面板上的 SPAD 按钮释放制动。

source: Denied. Dispatcher is unable to authorize movements.
target: 已拒绝，调度员无法授权此次调动

source: Denied. Move up to the signal and wait.
target: 已拒绝，请前进至信号灯处等待

source: Denied. Service not authorized in signalled area.
target: 已拒绝，信号区域内未授权提供服务
已拒绝，前方区段有列车

source: Denied. Wait for signal to change.
target: 已拒绝，请等待信号改变

source: Denied. Your train appears to be off path.
target: 已拒绝，您的列车似乎偏离了预定轨道
